summary: Neither French laypeople nor health professionals accept breaking patient confidentiality to safeguard a spouse from a sexually transmitted infection; this action violates both medical ethics and applicable legal frameworks designed to preserve privacy. Public health obligations related to STIs do not authorize disclosing sensitive data to partners without explicit authorization or court order.
